steps: Go to https://app.sparkpost.com and log in or create an account
In the left navigation bar, find and click 'Configuration'
Enter a key name and select the required permissions (e.g., Transmissions: Read/Write for sending email)
Optionally restrict the key to specific IP addresses or subaccounts
Copy the API key immediately — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your SparkPost API key. Sent directly in the Authorization header without any prefix.

notes: Free tier available with 500 emails/month (Starter plan)
API key is shown only once at creation — copy it immediately
No 'Bearer' or 'token' prefix needed — pass the raw key in the Authorization header
Grant only the permissions your integration needs (principle of least privilege)
Separate keys can be created for different subaccounts or environments

test_endpoint.description: List all sending domains configured in the account
